top_signals.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
top_signals.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nearly 100 Catholic leaders oppose Clarity Act over weakened safeguards against illicit finance and trafficking
top_signals.summary: The Alliance to End Human Trafficking, which is supported by Catholic organizations, pushed back against the sweeping cryptocurrency bill.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Asian tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung up 9%
top_signals.summary: Asia's technology stocks rebounded on Wednesday after global equities posted steep losses in the previous session.
